title: Create Christmas Wooden Advent Number Tags 24 Pack, Make Your Own DIY Christmas Advent Calendar, Family Craft, Countdown To Christmas, Crafts Accessories
features: MAKE Start the countdown to Christmas with your own advent calendar to find out how many days are left until Christmas, keeping the entire family excited throughout December. Family craft. Fill empty bag or box with treats & hang with advent numbers tags

CREATIVITY In addition to the Christmas calendar these wooden number tags can be used for decoration in home, kitchen, decor, Christmas trees, calendars or handmade gifts, string them to make into pendants. The Christmas creative options are endless

EMBELLISH Plain wooden pieces are simple and flat shapes, with a natural rustic colour. Add colour by painting and adding glitter to make personalised and festive. Wooden materials adopted laser cut technology and are essential supplies for craft kit

CRAFT Great festive fun for the whole family, on the countdown to Christmas. There is nothing better than the build up to the most wonderful time of the year. Get truly festive with Christmas crafting

RANGE Designed with the festive season firmly in mind, Create Christmas is a best-selling range of everything you could possibly need for seasonal crafting. Fantastic value and amazing quality products
description: Designed to bring joy to crafters over the festive season, Create Christmas is the go-to range for seasonal crafting and gifting. With an exciting festive assortment of velvet, cotton and satin ribbons, crafters can get into the Christmas spirit by decorating gifts or embellishing cards for friends and family! And don’t forget their stash of buttons, charms, pom poms, stickers, jingle bells, wooden shapes and polystyrene bases! The Create Christmas range helps crafters do exactly that - create a truly beautiful Christmas.
